programme.title: Dedh Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujan and Babban seek refuge at the Majidabad palace as they run from the law. Khalujan tries to woo a wealthy widow with poetry, Babban and the widow's assistant plan a kidnapping.

programme.title: Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four slack and vagabond conmen learn about a hidden treasure from a dying thief and race against time to claim it. Meanwhile, they are also being pursued by a determined police inspector who is hell-bent on finding the treasure and keeping it all to himself.

programme.title: Dhol
programme.desc: Four young loafers wish to simplify their life by wooing a loaded heiress. Unfortunately, there's only one rich girl in the neighbourhood. The boys scamper to woo her first, not knowing that their efforts would lead them right into a murder mystery.

programme.title: Ricky Bhai Yash
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Patas
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Surya 420
programme.desc: A transgender man struggles to realise his sexual orientation while dealing with the social stigma and taboo related to gender transition in the society.

programme.title: Billa 2
programme.desc: Small-time diamond smuggler David befriends Goa-based gangster Abbasi. However, when David begins to build inroads with an international criminal, Abbasi is not happy.

programme.title: Mission Istanbul
programme.desc: An action thriller film that follows the story of a journalist, Vikas, who is sent to Istanbul to cover a breaking news story. However, he becomes embroiled in a dangerous conspiracy involving international terrorism and political corruption. The movie features high-octane action sequences and explores themes of courage, patriotism, and the importance of journalistic integrity in a thrilling and suspenseful plot.

programme.title: Kyo Ki Main Jhuth Nahin Bolta
programme.desc: In this film based on the American comedy "Liar Liar," Raj Malhotra (Govinda) is a lawyer who succeeds professionally by constant lying. His persistent dishonesty infuriates his wife (Sushmita Sen), who threatens to leave him if he doesn't straighten out. Fearful of his parents' divorce, Raj's son wishes that his father could not lie, and creates a sort of curse that prevents Raj from speaking anything but the truth. Raj soon finds that honesty, while sometimes vexing, yields its own rewards.

programme.title: Tapish
programme.desc: The story of Lajwanti, who questions in this era of modernization how much have we actually advanced and how much of it is fake imitation of the west. The story of Lajwanti, who questions in this era of modernization how much have we actually advanced and how much of it is fake imitation of the west.

programme.title: If is a Big Word
programme.desc: It seems to the 35-year-old Yekaterina Kolesnikova that her life got on to the wrong track: instead of being a model on the catwalk in Milan she works in a factory making working clothes. And her husband, a once brilliant and talented musician, has turned out to be a local finance officer. But now Fate suddenly gives Katya a chance to go back seventeen years and try to change her life. Will it make her happy?

programme.title: Dandelion
programme.desc: Two of the most prosperous families in town – the Adrianovs and the Zeldovs - are preparing for the marriage of their children, an advantageous match and a union that promises to benefit both families' business interests. The day before the wedding celebrations are due to commence, the groom, Rodion Andrianov, meets a plain ‘dandelion' blonde girl Sonia under unusual circumstances when the elevator in which they are both traveling suddenly breaks down.

programme.title: Terror Of Hallow'S Eve
programme.desc: After a fifteen-year-old is brutally beaten up by High School bullies, his wish for revenge unknowingly unleashes the Terror of Halloween.

programme.title: Ouija House
programme.desc: A girl takes her friends to a house with a dark past for a research project. They unwittingly summon an evil entity with plans of its own who makes the house part of its sinister game.

programme.title: Personal Interest
programme.desc: Tatiana makes her escape from prison and seeks a hideout in a remote village of Pavlovka, in her late grandmother's house. There she meets Maxim who has come to the village to take a break from the hectic city life. Instant chemistry sparks between them. Everything would be just fine were it not for Tatiana's ex-boyfriend, Oleg, who comes to the village looking for her. Tatiana is forced to tell Maxim the whole truth about herself. She tells him about the robbery she committed together with Oleg and how she took all the blame on herself and then escaped from prison. Maxim assures her that he will be by her side no matter what and will help her get through all this.

programme.title: Don't Come Back From The Moon
programme.desc: Fathers in a small California desert town abandon their children, leaving a wake of anger and crime.

programme.title: Steve Martini's The Judge
programme.desc: The reputation of Paul Madriani, the much-admired lawyer is at stake as he is called to defend Judge Acosta.

programme.title: Flash Gordon
programme.desc: Ming steals a lake from Earth, so Flash and his friends head to Mongo with plans to destroy the generator.

programme.title: Different Flowers
programme.desc: On the day of her big Midwestern wedding, Millie, a persnickety bride, jilts her fiance at the altar.

programme.title: Shift
programme.desc: After meeting a mysterious stranger, a man must escape a dystopian world to return to his wife.

programme.title: In The Cage
programme.desc: Marvin Fields is caught up with challenges and obstacles. On the verge of losing his family, he has to step up and face his adversaries. Marvin tries different avenues to help eliminate these difficulties, but his efforts are futile. Now, he decides to take desperate measures in saving his family and finances. When hell breaks loose and nothing seems to work, a true character is revealed through Marvin. Later on, Marvin discovers martial arts through his best friend Frank Biggs. This martial art will help Marvin find himself again and give him a sense of purpose. As he continues to search deeper his new found art, his troubles aren't stagnant. Marvin still has to wake up and face the demons of his life. Marvin has got to get his life out of this never diminishing cage and find freedom. In the meantime, Claire Fields (Marvin's wife) is fed up and tired of supporting the family. Marvin's cage seems invisible to Claire, and this continues to trigger his frustration. In the end, true love and friendship will be revealed and seem to help break down the barriers around this mysterious cage.

programme.title: Hit-and-Run Squad
programme.desc: Min-jae, a rookie police officer with a natural born talent for driving, is assigned to the perfect team: the Hit-and-Run Squad. But at the same time, for police detective Si-yeon, it is a place she is unjustly demoted to for doing her job. The two team up to arrest the rich and powerful speed maniac Jae-chul who is suspected of committing crimes for his obsession for speed.

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Ki-joon and Hee-yeol become best friends at the police academy, despite differences in their personality. During their outing, they witness a kidnapping incident and report it to the police right away. However, because of the lack of evidence, the investigation doesn't progress while precious time is being wasted. Ki-joon and Hee-yeol decide to take the investigation into their own hands. The only problem is they have zero experience in a real investigation.

programme.title: Movie Brunch-Chhalle Mundiyaan
programme.desc: Starcast-AmmyVirk, MandyTakhar, KulwinderBilla, SoniaKaur, KaramjitAnmol, SunilPuri, GuramritpalSingh, GurjitPalSingh

programme.title: Bloomberg Next Africa
programme.desc: A monthly deep dive into Africa's biggest stories through a Bloomberg lens. Global investors see the continent as one of the top areas for opportunity and growth, and some African nations are well-positioned to be global hubs for development. This show will discuss key steps taken to help deliver on Africa's quest of bridging the gap with global powers, and track capital flows and the direction of funds amid the underlying political, economic and social developments.

programme.title: Beti Hamari Anmol
programme.desc: In this hugely inspirational success story, Anmol, a small town girl, not only fights the societal obstacles faced by any small town girl in our country but also takes on the social stigma she has had to face for being so short heighted that she has been termed as a “dwarf”. Anmol, with her strong will power and belief in herself, fights the hate she has had to receive from her in-law's. Anmol becomes a doctor with the support of her husband, in the same hospital where her father works as a peon, to win back her dignity as well as bring a lot of pride to her and her in law's family.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This Story Is About A 19Year Old Girl Named Chunari, Who Dreams Of Marriage And A Happy Family. However, She Becomes Entangled In The Chains Of Deceit, Finding Herself On The Path To Becoming A Dahej Daasi, Which Is A Tradition Still Prevalent In The Backward Regions Of Rajasthan. The Show Unfolds Into A Compelling Drama Of Tradition Versus Rebellion, Love Versus Oppression.

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Jerry the Golfer
programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: Juggler
programme.desc: Super Hungry" is a comedic adventure showcasing Jerry's insatiable appetite and Jane's playful attempts to feed him. Jane's idea of using "Hunger Syrup" leads to unexpected consequences as Jerry accidentally consumes the entire bottle, causing his hunger to intensify. A hilarious chase ensues as Jerry devours everyt_hing in sight, leaving Jane both amazed and exhausted. With a clever twist involving chili and a bucket of water, Jerry's hunger is finally satiated, resulting in laughter and relief for both characters

programme.title: Domino's Effect
programme.desc: In their imaginative world, Jerry transforms into a baby superhero, emulating heroic actions and surprising Jane with his playful antics. Jerry's mischievousness leads to both laughter and chall_hines as he playfully interrupts Jane's daily activities. However, when faced with a real threat in the form of a cockroach, Jerry's true superhero nature emerges, and he comes to Jane's rescue. With their bond str_hinthened, Jane rewards Jerry with a real superhero cape, acknowledging his extraordinary spirit. Together, they triumph over obstacles and celebrate their super-powered adventures.

programme.title: Magic Marker
programme.desc: JERRY, a curious and mischievous toddler, playing on the floor withsome toys. He notices amagic marker on the coffee table and picks it up.He starts to draw on the walls and furniture, creating colorful and abstract designs.

programme.title: BirthdayCake
programme.desc: Jerry playfully disrupts Jane's cleaning routine by scattering toys and bowls. He surprises Jane by juggling the toys and later the crockeries, showcasing his dexterity and coordination. Jane joins in the fun, and they _hinage in a playful juggling act together, creating a harmonious and entertaining moment in their home.

programme.title: Freaky Furry
programme.desc: When a freak accident causes Angie to switch bodies with her dog, Skeezer falls hard for the new Angie while the old Angie goes rabid with frustration.

programme.title: Nanobots Byte
programme.desc: When Angie's garbage-eating nanobots escape from the lab, the Secret Lab Kids must stop them before they turn the planet into one giant feeding ground.

programme.title: The Monster Not Under the Bed
programme.desc: The Secret Lab Kids shrink themselves to microscopic proportions in order to prove to Joelle that there are no monsters hiding under her bed. They just didn't count on all the other microscopic creatures.

programme.title: Amusement park
programme.desc: ," Jane and Jerry _hinage in a playful dance-off, constantly trying to one-up each other. Their antics escalate as they use various props to outdo the other, leading to a comical series of mishaps. However, when their beloved music player breaks, they realize the power of their shared passion for music and come together to create their own joyful tune, ending on a heartwarming note of friendship and celebration.

programme.title: Domino's Effect

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.title: The Hide And Seek !
programme.desc: When Sarah must head into the field to investigate an illness that is affecting the park's deer

programme.title: The Frances's Garden

programme.title: The I Wish I was the greatest Detective in the World
programme.desc: Following the mysterious disappearnce of various garden gnomes in town

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: Jerry grows into a giant after wearing a special ring gadget. Jane tries to evade him but is eventually captured and carried around like a toy. She manages to escape by using the ring to shrink Jerry back to his normal size. They reconcile, and Jane playfully throws the ring away, bringing an end to their giant-sized adventure.

programme.title: The I Wish my Mimi was Real
programme.desc: Jane loves her virtual pet so much, that she wishes that they would be real

programme.title: Lazy
programme.desc: JaneandJerryarepackingandkeepingfruits,bottle,hat,toys,clothesinsideapicnicbasket.Thentheygooutsidethehouse

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. As the clock strikes midnight, signaling the end of Jerry's birthday, they become disheartened. However, a spontaneous cake mishap involving the fan brings laughter and joy to both characters, turning the situation into a hilarious and memorable moment

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 16
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Bust Ep 11
programme.desc: The bumbling but lovable Bear Brothers are back, and Logger Vick remains in hot pursuit! Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 11
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 11
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It' s a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It' s a good neighbourhood. programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It' s countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer' s back is turned.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase' s father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Cindrella Ep 10
programme.desc: Young Cinderella, struggling with abuse from her stepmother and stepsisters, receives help from her fairy godmother and animal friends while finding adventure and romance with a dashing man who hides the fact that he is a prince.

programme.title: Jungle Book Ep 31
programme.desc: This story is about, " The adventures of Mowgli, an orphan boy raised by wolves, and his friends in the jungle." Young Mowglu and his animal friends, Bagheera and Baloo, adventur together in the wilderness.

programme.desc: Prof. Krupnik discovers a mysterious hacker on the Internet.

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: Zaza is in trouble! She's being held captive on a pirate ship. Bob and his friends have to come up with a rescue plan...

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: Hartacker is annoyed that the crocodiles are preventing him from building a mega leisure center. To chase the crocodiles away, he uses nasty beetles...

programme.title: Fix & Foxi Show
programme.desc: Prof. Knox's new invention is to be tested on F&F: an electronic babysitter - F&F feel too old for such a thing / Everyone flies their kites. Lupo cuts up and gets into trouble when his Rie-sendrachen pulls him into the air... / F&F can earn a few pennies by cleaning out Uncle Fax's garage, but unfortunately they also sell a vase that Fax needs and Grandma Eusebia has bought... / Lucky has broken a leg sits bored at his "window to the yard" and suddenly observes terrible things at his neighbor Old Snotty. One by one he sends his family over, but no one comes back. Lucky is overcome with panic.

programme.title: Gloria s House
programme.desc: Gloria's school urgently needs money. To this end, the children are asked to sell chocolate. Gloria brings home several boxes of chocolate. But Beat can't help himself and devours the chocolate...

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: The goblins go on the attack. The elves are desperate. Colonel Daiman, plagued by a guilty conscience, comes to their aid at the last second...

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: When Milly wakes up at night, she is terrified of the storm. The curtains in her room have taken on strange shapes and she suddenly fears that curtain monsters are hiding behind them. To be on the safe side, she has to pull the curtain back somehow. So she invents a "fear repeller" to help her pull back the curtains. When she finally succeeds, she discovers that Black Cat has hidden behind the curtain with her friends. So Milly no longer has any reason to be afraid of the storm.

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: The Da Boom Crew has landed in a remote desert town inhabited by rather strange-looking aliens. The aliens ask the kids to ask the Great Protector for help...

programme.title: Adventurers Masters of Time
programme.desc: Krupnik, Fire, Nevin and Gaius fall into the hacker's trap.

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: An evil professor launches Operation Saturn! He captures Bob to shoot him onto Saturn with a rocket. Bob's friends must prevent this at all costs...

programme.title: Gloria s House
programme.desc: It's project day at school. The task is to start an advertising campaign in pairs. Gloria comes up with the idea of advertising her father's handicrafts. She designs brochures and distributes them...

programme.title: Shadow of the Elves
programme.desc: Snakehammer of all people, the ingenious goblin inventor, loses his memory by a stupid accident. When he wakes up from his unconsciousness, he finds himself among the trolls...

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.desc: Winter crab season arrives with the year's biggest storm every captain must choose whether to risk heading out into the storm or stay back.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the worlds biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the worlds worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet 231 miles per hour was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a human popsicle, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Councils high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Dominica, the most volcanic and mountainous island in the Caribbean, is home to the Boiling Lake, a large waterfall-fed lake of furiously boiling water. Adventurer George Kourounis becomes the first person ever to traverse across the lake on a rope, risking his life to take water samples and shoot video from a place no human has ever been. He then dives to the ocean floor off the coast of the island to explore vents where the superheated water bubbles into the ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: One of the most exciting episodes of season one is Wild Water our look at Great White Sharks, water-filled caves and high voltage marine action.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Miners in Chihauhau, Mexico, has just discovered an amazing sight. Deep in the earth, only 300 feet from a pocket of molten magma, is an amazing chamber filled with giant blue and pink crystals some as big as 60 feet long! It is an extraordinary find and one that is very difficult to witness, as temperatures run to 150 F, with 100% humidity. The Mexican authorities are only opening up the cavern to scientists and film crews Angry Planet plans to be one of the first in!

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We have filmed extensively in Hawaii, filming big-wave surfing at the famous Banzai Pipeline on Oahus North Shore, and filming George surfing with the Hawaian Fire firefighters. We have also filmed at the Hawaii Tsunami Institute and in Hilo, site of major Tsunami damage in both 1946 and 1964. We also have filmed extensively at Kilawea Volcano, filming the amazing sight of rivers and waterfalls of red hot lava flowing into the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Heres the deal: Mt.Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Heres the first kicker:High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave a cave created by the most unique form of erosion Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with thir tusks in order to eat the salty rock.Heres the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus the worlds most deadly virus.So heres the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.desc: When first presented with the like button Facebook CEO Mark Zuckerberg had a simple response: “No.” He worried that it would discourage more meaningful online interaction. Eventually, his team changed his mind and transformed the world.,

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.desc: A futuristic designer, Robert Propst, dreamed up “The Action Office” as a workplace utopia that would unleash the modern knowledge worker's vast untapped potential.,

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.desc: Barcodes have radically changed global commerce, helping fuel the rise of everything from massive companies like Walmart to world powers like China. And it all started with a man daydreaming on a beach in 1949.,

programme.title: Zenith: Advances in Space Exploration
programme.desc: This episode looks at the evolution of the modern spacesuit, capable of supporting life in extreme conditions.,

programme.title: Zenith: Advances in Space Exploration
programme.desc: This episode reveals what we know about the solar system's difficult to reach planets and the probes that have visited them.,

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: A diverse group of distantly related families and species sharing a few common traits, marine invertebrates include polyps, octopus and jellyfish.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: Explore the family dynamic of wildebeests, elephants, and giraffes as we take a trip around Africa.

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Endemic only to South Africa, the African penguins are a national treasure and yet they face a sixteen year countdown to extinction. Can this be reversed? Swati walks with the penguins to answer these questions.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: Animals use communication to attract mates,warn off predators, defend territory, or trick their prey. And of course, it's the senses that play the key role - Sight, smell, taste, touch, and hearing - all are employed to send signals to others.,

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: In this last episode of Super Senses we take the grand final tour to see the greatest of all the special weapons that help some animals to govern the wilderness. In this episode we see it, hear it, touch it, smell it and taste it like animals do.,

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: As expert hunters, the Bald Eagle is perfectly adapted to life in tough arctic conditions, but in Anchorage, the secret to their survival...is trash.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: For years, at least four wolfpacks have lived and hunted on the edge of Anchorage. But as the city spreads further into wolf country, they are getting bolder, and attacks on humans are increasing.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Hundreds of Black Bears live in Anchorage and have found a food source that is much easier to catch than slippery salmon - it's trash. Any it's everywhere. With their brains, brawn and cunning these bears have mastered life in the urban jungle.

programme.title: Wild Animal Rescue
programme.desc: We follow FOUR PAWS' efforts to give captive lions a better life. A family of five lions who suffered a harsh life in a Romanian zoo, are given a new home, and a new lease on life and we take a look at a shocking, yet legal industry.

programme.title: Wild Animal Rescue
programme.sub-title: Closing the Worst Zoo In The World
programme.desc: Animals at a struggling zoo in Gaza are in desperate need of aid. Left devastated by war, Khan Younis Zoo was dubbed the ‘worst zoo in the world.' In 2014 Khan Younis Zoo boasted 44 animals now only 15 remain. FOUR PAWS must rapidly swing into action

programme.title: Extreme Car Hoarders: Street Legal

programme.desc: For no good reason, David has always wanted to drive a Pontiac Bonneville to the Bonneville Salt Flats Steve picks up a 1967 station wagon, and the two are on the road, arriving in Utah to a big surprise.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: David's 1971 Plymouth Road Runner is taken to the Steve Dulcich Dog Farm to be fixed up and turned into a daily driver.

programme.title: Bernardine Church and Monastery, Ukraine
programme.desc: In one of the most beautiful and hospitable cities of Ukraine sits the Bernardine monastery, a defensive outpost of Lviv and the Church of Saint Andrew, both monuments of Renaissance architecture.

programme.title: Holy Martyr George, Serbia
programme.desc: The Church of St George, and the Karadjordjevic dynasty's Mausoleum, tell the story of the First Serbian Uprising the Ottoman authorities: George Petrovic, nicked names Black Georges. It is the pearl of the cultural and historical heritage of Topola and O"&"plenac in Serbia.

programme.title: Mar Elias Monastery
programme.desc: Mar Elias monastery lies on the side of the road from Jerusalem and Bethlehem. It is maintained by the Greek-Orthodox church, and by local tradition Elijah rested here while fleeing from Queen Jezebel

programme.title: Orhei Vechi Monastery, Moldova
programme.desc: Old Orhei is a Moldovan historical and archaeological complex located in Trebujeni, which is approximately 60 kilometres (37 mi) north-east of Chişinău on the Răut River in the Republic of Moldova. The ancient city of Orheiul Vechi is a natural and historical complex, located in a narrow bend of the Raut River. The natural landscape of limestone rock, eroded by the river, is combined with archaeological vestiges of the ancient Trypillian civilization. The Orthodox monastery is still inhabited by a handful of Orthodox monks, who maintain the church at the top of the hill. The caves are still functional as chapels. The caves contain an array of historical artifacts.

programme.title: Aosta Cathedral Part 1, Aosta Valley, Italy
programme.desc: Dating back to the beginning of Christianity's diffusion, and founded near an ancient Roman Forum in the 4th century, discover The Aosta Cathedral. Remodeled with a neoclassical façade built in 1848, it is now also housing a museum of the Aosta Valley's "&"sacred Art.

programme.title: Ein Kerem, Israel Part 2
programme.desc: Ein Kerem, the place of the birth of Saint John the Baptist, as well as the visitation of Mary, but also a chic and pastoral touristic place…

programme.title: The Good Samaritan Museum, Israel Part 2
programme.desc: On the road from Jerusalem to the Dead Sea, discover the Good Samaritain Museum, an archaeological and historical site. This museum, which is the only mosaic museum in the country and one of only three in the world, has artefacts which were unearthed in Judea, Samaria and Gaza on display.

programme.title: Church of Ecce Homo & Convent of the Sister of Zion, Israel
programme.desc: The Convent of the Sisters of Zion is a Roman Catholic convent of the Congregation of Notre-Dame de Sion, located near the eastern end of the Via Dolorosa in the Old City of Jerusalem. The convent was built in 1857 by Marie-Alphonse Ratisbonne.The site in"&"cludes the Church of Ecce Homo, also known as the Basilica of Ecce Homo, named for Pontius Pilate's Ecce homo speech which is traditionally thought to have taken place on the pavement below the church.

programme.title: Ein Kerem Israel Part1
programme.desc: Ein Kerem, the place of the birth of Saint John the Baptist, as well as the visitation of Mary, but also a chic and pastoral touristic place…

programme.title: Sea of Galilee, Israel Part 1
programme.desc: On the shores of the Sea of Galilee, also called the Lake of Tiberias, discover a freshwater lake with an area of 166 m2 located in the North-East of Israel. Of course this lake is of great importance to Christians : at this particular place, several episodes of Jesus' life took place.

programme.title: Lisbon Historic Center, Portugal, Part 1
programme.desc: One of the most charismatic, vibrant, and picturesque cities in Europe: Lisbon, Portugal's capital. It is a city where a rich historical past, striking modernism, and progressive thinking are closely and organically combined.

programme.title: HOTELS on the Altiplano in Bolivia, Peru
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Courchevel in France.

programme.title: Bosa Old town, Sardinia, Italy
programme.desc: The beautiful Bosa Old Town finds itself in Alghero To Oristano, an area strongly influenced by Spanish culture. The city is generally considered to have been founded in 1102. However, long before the Christian era, the Phoenicians set up a trading post o"&"n this exposed bay in western Sardinia.

programme.title: HOTELS in Singapore Part 2
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Brazil

programme.title: Arnad town, Aosta Valley, Italy
programme.desc: Arnad town in Aosta Valley is known for the production of the D.O.C Montjovet wine. The small medieval village stands on the banks of the Dora Baltea. It is situated on the banks of the Dora Baltea. Arnad has its roots in tradition: from rock climbing a"&"mong the most famous Alps to the walks in the woods of chestnut or between churches and castles, testimonies of a great past. Nature, sport, history, genuine flavors, relaxation.

programme.title: Voronezh Town, Russia
programme.desc: In the southern part of Russia, by the river Voronezh, there is a city with the same name. It has a long history of remarkable men and women who prospered and fell here. The city fought for freedom countless times and brought a lot of talented artists to "&"the world. It is a city of strong people and fantastic architecture. Voronezh was founded in 1585 when tsar Fyodor ordered to start the building of a new fortress on the Voronezh-river's bank to create a barrier from southern invasions. The fortress was f"&"inished around 1586 and defended Russians only for four years before it was burnt to the ground by cossacks.

programme.title: The Good Samaritan Museum, Israel Part 2
programme.desc: On the road from Jerusalem to the Dead Sea, discover the Good Samaritain Museum, an archaeological and historical site. This museum, which is the only mosaic museum in the country and one of only three in the world, has artefacts which were unearthed in J"&"udea, Samaria and Gaza on display. You are in the area of Ma'ale Adumim (Red Heights), on the same road that pilgrims used to take on their way to Jerusalem, particularly those coming from the Galilee via the Jordan Valley and Jericho, in the footsteps of"&" Jesus and John the Baptist…

programme.title: Pskov City, Russia
programme.desc: Pskov: One of the most beautiful and ancient cities located in the north-west of Russia on the Velikaya River! Only 20 kilometers from the Estonian border, church-studded city Pskov is dominated by its mighty riverside Kremlin: an enormous bulwark that ha"&"s faced up to its fair share of invading armies down the centuries.

programme.title: Carloforte Old Town, Sardinia, Italy
programme.desc: Approximately 7 kilometers off the Southwestern Coast of Sardinia, there is an Island with rugged cliffs, no rivers, and a coastline full of beautiful coves. This is San Pietro. On this Island, only one town: Carloforte. It is an Italian village in Southe"&"rn Sardinia, as well as an honorary city of Genoa.

programme.title: HOTELS in the Baleares: Mallorca
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Barcelona in Spain.

programme.title: Fly Guys

programme.title: Fly Guys
programme.desc: The Guys try to jump over a speeding train. Then, they figure out the best way to get out of a rock and a hard place.

programme.title: Fly Guys
programme.desc: The Guys make a dunking video with flame throwers. Then, they travel to Croatia for some cliff diving like you've never seen before,

programme.title: Fly Guys
programme.desc: A treadmill, an ATV, a wetsuit, and a wobbly track, what could go wrong? Then, the Guys get chased through a castle.

programme.title: The E/O
programme.desc: Skater turned stuntman Justice Hedenberg, Wushu master “JJ” Zengjiao Jian, slackliner Olga Henry, and extreme athlete KC Deane are featured

programme.title: Roadfood Adventures USA
programme.desc: Travel the South to find the most colorful roads in the nation and discover delicious food, magnificent scenery, magic moments, and fascinating people all along the way.

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America. Into America's Wild is a non-stop ride via kayak, train, bike, hot air balloon and more that explores the transformational allure of wild places and the human connection we all share with the natural world.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric treks the canyons and waters of Lake Powell, Utah on foot and via packraft.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric leaves the backcountry to discover urban hiking adventures in the cities of Los Angeles and San Francisco, California.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 1
programme.desc: Canadians Sophie and Anna go on a journey of discovery, luck and love in the Cradle of Liberty, Boston, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 2
programme.desc: Gabby and Jono try their luck in panoramic Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 3
programme.desc: Percy and Michelle go on a game of chance in the Emerald city of Seattle.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: When you're surrounded by breathtaking mountain landscapes, it would be easy to rely on tradition and stay the same. However, this destination does the exact opposite. Whether it's creating a state-of-the-art museum to honor the United States' greatest athletes, modernizing its natural attractions so they're accessible to all, or creating a community that invites success, there's excitement in the air for what is new and innovative. See why Colorado Springs, Colorado is a Place to Love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Few places compare to coastal Maine's wild beauty. It's where mountains meet the ocean, marine animals have island retreats, and the air comes perfectly salted. It's known as summer vacationland with a coastline that stretches over 3,400 miles, punctuated with lighthouses, schooners, and fabulous lobster shacks. Throw in a foggy sunrise at Cadillac Mountain and boom—you'll see why Maine has captured so many hearts. Here's why Maine is a place to love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: In St. Augustine, Florida, wandering is encouraged and time is meant to be savored. It's a historic powerhouse of a destination where local events not only shaped its history but an entire country's. With an unexpected food scene, protected wetlands, and miles of beautiful beaches to explore, there's a lot to sink your (shark) teeth into. Join Samantha as she explores America's oldest city – St. Augustine, Florida.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy's digging in to all kinds of meat: out of the smoker, on the grill, and into the fryer when he visits Miami, FL, and Modesto and Stockton, CA.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits joints taking childhood favorites to a gourmet level. A Denver bar cooks up tater tots, pork rinds and a pastrami sandwich. A Tacoma spot turns out pork shoulder tacos, elk sliders and parmesan stuffed tater tots.
